title: Add more recipes
description: It adds recipes for Elytra, Totems of Undying, Enchanted Golden Apples, and many other items.
body:
English:
It adds recipes for Elytra, Totems of Undying, Enchanted Golden Apples, and many other items.

(tips:Using a translator, the meaning may not be accurate.)

Chinese:
它为鞘翅，不死图腾，附魔金苹果以及其他很多东西添加了配方。
